description: Systematically improve the docs website layout, alignment, spacing, typography, and visual consistency to make it the most visually appealing neobrutalist docs site. All changes are CSS/className-only within the docs/ directory — no functional changes. The docs site is a Next.js 16 + Fumadocs + Tailwind CSS 4 static site with a RetroUI neobrutalist design system. Verification: cd docs && bun run build (next build with output: export).

userStories.title: Unify horizontal padding and max-width across home page sections
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want the home page sections to have consistent horizontal padding and aligned content widths so the page feels cohesive rather than having content jump at different widths per section.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section uses max-w-5xl (was max-w-4xl) to match the Features section width
CTA section uses max-w-5xl (was max-w-2xl) and text-center to match other sections' content width
How-it-works section uses max-w-5xl (was max-w-4xl) to match Features
All four home page sections use the same px-6 horizontal padding (already consistent)
All four sections' inner max-width containers are max-w-5xl so content left edges align when scrolling
cd docs && bun run build passes
userStories.notes:
File: docs/app/page.tsx

Current widths:
- Hero (line 52): max-w-4xl
- Features (line 78): max-w-5xl
- How-it-works (line 97): max-w-4xl
- CTA (line 131): max-w-2xl + text-center

Change hero, how-it-works, and CTA to max-w-5xl. For CTA keep text-center. This creates a unified content column width across all sections.

Verification command: cd docs && bun run build

userStories.title: Improve home page vertical rhythm and section spacing
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want consistent vertical spacing between home page sections so the page has a balanced, rhythmic flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section vertical padding is py-20 md:py-28 (was py-16 md:py-24) for more generous top-of-page breathing room
Features section vertical padding is py-20 (was py-16) to match rhythm
How-it-works section vertical padding is py-20 (was py-16) to match rhythm
CTA section vertical padding is py-20 (was py-16) to match rhythm
Hero subtitle margin-bottom increases from mb-8 to mb-10 for more space before buttons
Features section title margin-bottom increases from mb-10 to mb-12 for clearer section header separation
cd docs && bun run build passes
userStories.notes:
File: docs/app/page.tsx All vertical padding changes in the section elements: - Line 51: Hero
py-16 md:py-24 -> py-20 md:py-28 - Line 61: Hero

mb-8 -> mb-10 - Line 77: Features

py-16 -> py-20 - Line 80: Features mb-10 -> mb-12 - Line 96: How-it-works
py-16 -> py-20 - Line 130: CTA
py-16 -> py-20 This establishes a consistent 80px (py-20) vertical rhythm across all sections, with the hero being slightly more generous (py-20 md:py-28).

userStories.title: Improve feature cards and how-it-works cards visual polish
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want the feature cards and how-it-works step cards to have more breathing room and better internal spacing so they feel premium rather than cramped.
acceptanceCriteria: Feature cards padding increases from p-5 to p-6 for more internal breathing room
Feature cards gap between icon/title/description increases from gap-3 to gap-3 (keep) but icon font-size increases from text-3xl to text-4xl for better visual weight
Feature card description text changes from text-sm to text-sm leading-relaxed for improved readability
How-it-works step cards padding increases from p-5 to p-6
How-it-works step number box size increases from size-10 to size-12 with text-xl (was text-lg) for better prominence
How-it-works step card description uses text-sm leading-relaxed for improved readability
cd docs && bun run build passes
userStories.notes:
File: docs/app/page.tsx

Feature cards (line 85): Change p-5 to p-6, change icon div text-3xl to text-4xl, change description text-sm to 'text-sm leading-relaxed'

How-it-works cards (line 117): Change p-5 to p-6
Step number box (line 118): Change 'size-10' to 'size-12', change 'text-lg' to 'text-xl'
Step description (line 122): Change 'text-sm' to 'text-sm leading-relaxed'

userStories.title: Improve MDX prose typography spacing and line heights
userStories.description: As a reader, I want the docs prose content to have better line height and paragraph spacing so long-form text is comfortable to read.
acceptanceCriteria: Paragraph elements (p) add leading-relaxed for improved line height (currently just text-base with default leading)
List items (li) add leading-relaxed for consistent line height with paragraphs
Unordered and ordered lists add space-y-2 instead of space-y-1 for more breathing room between items
Blockquote adds leading-relaxed and italic styling for visual distinction
Heading h2 top margin increases from mt-8 to mt-10 for clearer section separation
Heading h3 top margin increases from mt-6 to mt-8 for better hierarchy spacing
cd docs && bun run build passes
userStories.notes:
File: docs/mdx-components.tsx

Line 106 (p): 'mb-4 font-sans text-base' -> 'mb-4 font-sans text-base leading-relaxed'
Line 109 (ul): 'mb-4 list-outside list-disc space-y-1 pl-6 font-sans' -> 'mb-4 list-outside list-disc space-y-2 pl-6 font-sans'
Line 112 (ol): 'mb-4 list-outside list-decimal space-y-1 pl-6 font-sans' -> 'mb-4 list-outside list-decimal space-y-2 pl-6 font-sans'
Line 115 (li): 'font-sans text-base' -> 'font-sans text-base leading-relaxed'
Line 118-119 (blockquote): 'border-primary bg-accent/20 my-4 border-l-4 px-4 py-3 font-sans' -> 'border-primary bg-accent/20 my-4 border-l-4 px-4 py-3 font-sans italic leading-relaxed'
Line 91 (h2): 'font-head mt-8 mb-3 text-3xl font-semibold lg:text-4xl' -> 'font-head mt-10 mb-3 text-3xl font-semibold lg:text-4xl'
Line 94 (h3): 'font-head mt-6 mb-2 text-2xl font-medium' -> 'font-head mt-8 mb-2 text-2xl font-medium'

userStories.title: Improve table cell padding and horizontal rule spacing
userStories.description: As a reader, I want tables to have more generous cell padding and horizontal rules to have consistent vertical spacing so content blocks are clearly separated.
acceptanceCriteria: Table header cells (th) padding changes from 'h-10 px-4 md:h-12' to 'h-12 px-4' for consistent height
Table body cells (td) padding changes from 'p-2 md:p-3' to 'px-4 py-3' for more generous and consistent padding
Table header cells and body cells use the same horizontal padding (px-4) so columns align cleanly
cd docs && bun run build passes
userStories.notes:
File: docs/mdx-components.tsx

Line 152 (th): 'text-primary-foreground h-10 px-4 text-left align-middle font-medium md:h-12' -> 'text-primary-foreground h-12 px-4 text-left align-middle font-medium'
Line 157 (td): 'p-2 align-middle md:p-3' -> 'px-4 py-3 align-middle'

This ensures th and td share px-4 horizontal padding so text in columns aligns perfectly between header and body rows.

userStories.title: Improve code block spacing and inline code visual weight
userStories.description: As a reader, I want code blocks to have slightly more vertical margin from surrounding prose, and inline code to have slightly more visual distinction.
acceptanceCriteria: RetroCodeBlock figure margin changes from my-4 to my-6 for more separation from surrounding prose
Inline code border changes from 'border' (1px) to 'border-2' (2px) to match the neobrutalist 2px border standard used everywhere else
Inline code adds font-semibold for slightly more visual weight to stand out in prose
cd docs && bun run build passes
userStories.notes:
File: docs/components/retroui-codeblock.tsx
Line 87: 'shiki not-prose relative my-4 overflow-hidden border-2 text-sm shadow-md' -> 'shiki not-prose relative my-6 overflow-hidden border-2 text-sm shadow-md'

File: docs/mdx-components.tsx
Line 131 (code): 'bg-muted border-border border px-1.5 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm' -> 'bg-muted border-border border-2 px-1.5 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm font-semibold'

The border-2 on inline code matches the neobrutalist convention where every bordered element uses 2px borders (cards, inputs, buttons, code blocks, tables all use border-2).

userStories.title: Improve prev/next footer and breadcrumb spacing
userStories.description: As a reader, I want the previous/next page navigation footer and breadcrumb to have better spacing and visual hierarchy.
acceptanceCriteria: RetroPageFooter top margin increases from mt-4 to mt-8 for more separation from page content
RetroPageFooter top padding increases from pt-6 to pt-8 for more breathing room after the border
RetroPageFooter link cards internal gap increases from gap-1 to gap-2 for better label/title separation
RetroPageBreadcrumb text size remains text-sm and spacing remains gap-1.5 (already good)
cd docs && bun run build passes
userStories.notes:
File: docs/components/retro-page-footer.tsx
Line 35: 'border-border mt-4 grid gap-4 border-t-2 pt-6' -> 'border-border mt-8 grid gap-4 border-t-2 pt-8'
Line 39: 'flex flex-col gap-1 border-2 p-4 shadow-md...' -> 'flex flex-col gap-2 border-2 p-4 shadow-md...'
Line 50: 'flex flex-col gap-1 border-2 p-4 text-end shadow-md...' -> 'flex flex-col gap-2 border-2 p-4 text-end shadow-md...'

userStories.title: Improve sidebar visual hierarchy and spacing
userStories.description: As a reader, I want the sidebar to have better visual hierarchy with clearer section headers and more consistent spacing between items.
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar section header paragraphs get additional margin-top: add 'mt-4' via CSS to #nd-sidebar p and #nd-sidebar-mobile p rules in global.css (currently they just have font/text styles but no vertical spacing)
Sidebar section header paragraphs get 'mb-1' via CSS for a small gap before the first link in the section
Active sidebar link adds a left border accent: add 'border-l-4 border-l-[var(--primary-foreground)]' style via CSS for a strong visual indicator beyond just background color
The sidebar active link CSS retains the existing background-color: var(--primary) and color: var(--primary-foreground)
cd docs && bun run build passes

userStories.title: Improve TOC visual hierarchy and active state
userStories.description: As a reader, I want the table of contents to have better spacing and a more prominent active heading indicator.
acceptanceCriteria: TOC title (#toc-title) gets margin-bottom: 0.75rem (12px) for clearer separation from the heading list (currently uses default spacing)
Active TOC heading gets a subtle background highlight: add background-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 15%, transparent) and padding-left: 0.5rem for a highlight effect
Inactive TOC headings get transition: color 150ms for smoother hover effect
cd docs && bun run build passes

userStories.title: Improve callout and card spacing within prose
userStories.description: As a reader, I want callouts and card grids to have more vertical separation from surrounding prose so they stand out as distinct content blocks.
acceptanceCriteria: RetroCallout adds my-6 vertical margin (currently just p-4 with no vertical margin — relies on prose spacing which is inconsistent)
RetroCards grid margin changes from my-6 to my-8 for more separation from surrounding content
RetroCard title uses mb-2 (was mb-1) for slightly more separation between title and description
cd docs && bun run build passes
userStories.notes:
File: docs/mdx-components.tsx

RetroCallout (line 31): 'relative w-full rounded border-2 p-4' -> 'relative my-6 w-full rounded border-2 p-4'
Note: Add my-6 to the className. The statusClasses are applied via cn() so they won't conflict.

RetroCards (line 81): 'my-6 grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2' -> 'my-8 grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2'

RetroCard title h3 (line 50): 'font-head mb-1 text-xl font-medium' -> 'font-head mb-2 text-xl font-medium'
